   Location: ./venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/nltk/grammar.py:739:4
738	
739	    def chomsky_normal_form(self, new_token_padding="@$@", flexible=False):
740	        """
741	        Returns a new Grammar that is in chomsky normal
742	
743	        :param: new_token_padding
744	            Customise new rule formation during binarisation
745	        """
746	        if self.is_chomsky_normal_form():
747	            return self
748	        if self.productions(empty=True):
749	            raise ValueError(
750	                "Grammar has Empty rules. " "Cannot deal with them at the moment"
751	            )
752	
753	        step1 = CFG.eliminate_start(self)
754	        step2 = CFG.binarize(step1, new_token_padding)
755	        step3 = CFG.remove_mixed_rules(step2, new_token_padding)
756	        if flexible:
757	            return step3
758	        step4 = CFG.remove_unitary_rules(step3)
759	        return CFG(step4.start(), list(set(step4.productions())))
760

   Location: ./venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/nltk/util.py:1221:0
1220	
1221	def set_proxy(proxy, user=None, password=""):
1222	    """
1223	    Set the HTTP proxy for Python to download through.
1224	
1225	    If ``proxy`` is None then tries to set proxy from environment or system
1226	    settings.
1227	
1228	    :param proxy: The HTTP proxy server to use. For example:
1229	        'http://proxy.example.com:3128/'
1230	    :param user: The username to authenticate with. Use None to disable
1231	        authentication.
1232	    :param password: The password to authenticate with.
1233	    """
1234	    if proxy is None:
1235	        # Try and find the system proxy settings
1236	        try:
1237	            proxy = getproxies()["http"]
1238	        except KeyError as e:
1239	            raise ValueError("Could not detect default proxy settings") from e
1240	
1241	    # Set up the proxy handler
1242	    proxy_handler = ProxyHandler({"https": proxy, "http": proxy})
1243	    opener = build_opener(proxy_handler)
1244	
1245	    if user is not None:
1246	        # Set up basic proxy authentication if provided
1247	        password_manager = HTTPPasswordMgrWithDefaultRealm()
1248	        password_manager.add_password(realm=None, uri=proxy, user=user, passwd=password)
1249	        opener.add_handler(ProxyBasicAuthHandler(password_manager))
1250	        opener.add_handler(ProxyDigestAuthHandler(password_manager))
1251	
1252	    # Override the existing url opener
1253	    install_opener(opener)
1254
